header.titleOwn: A Map of Energy and Destiny

empty.title: The reading begins with the date of birth
empty.description: Enter your date of birth to reveal your energy map.
empty.body: In this space, Aether will reveal your path number, your relationship field, the rhythm of your agency, and the key lesson that keeps recurring in your important decisions.
empty.listLabel: What you’ll see once you’ve activated it
items: The source of your energy and the place where you find peace.
The practical significance of numbers in relationships, work and intuition.
A question for Oracle that will shed further light on this.
empty.cta: Please complete the details at the sanctuary

hero.titleOwn: Your map of energy and destiny
hero.description: Eight numbers. Each one is a living model — in relationships, work, the body and intuition. The key insights are at the centre of the diagram.
hero.forecastIntention: Today’s intention: Observe how the energy of ‘{{name}}’ manifests itself in your decisions, conversations and feelings.

share.summary: The Centre {{center}} is the axis of this map. The connections are driven by the energy {{relationship}}, the agency {{money}}, and the lesson returns via {{bottom}}.

1.name: The Soul's Mission
1.desc: Your main purpose and calling in this lifetime. The heart of your journey.

2.name: Personal Energy
2.desc: How you act and how others perceive you. Your natural strength.

3.name: Challenges
3.desc: Karmic lessons and areas requiring work and attention.

4.name: Reports
4.desc: Your relationship patterns and what you attract in your loved ones.

5.name: Health
5.desc: Physical energy and areas to focus on for the care of body and mind.

6.name: Finance
6.desc: Your attitude towards money and abundance in this life.

7.name: Food of the Ancestors
7.desc: Patterns from your family lineage that you have come to work through.

8.name: Potential
8.desc: The greatest potential available to you in this lifetime.

9.name: Summary
9.desc: How all these energies come together to form your unique path.

axes.label: Core
axes.copy: The place where it’s easiest to restore harmony.

axes.label: Reports
axes.copy: A style characterised by connection, attraction and tension.

read.lifeAreasTitle: How does it work in real life?

lifeAreas.title: Love and relationships
lifeAreas.body: {{value}}'s energy reveals how you form connections and where you need more courage, reciprocity or boundaries.

lifeAreas.title: Work and materialisation
lifeAreas.body: {{value}}’s energy reveals where the flow of agency is natural, and where it begins to stall due to fear or overload.

lifeAreas.title: Intuition and development
lifeAreas.body: {{value}}’s Centre is a place where you can reconnect with your true self. It is here that you can most easily discern what truly belongs to you.

read.coreReadingTitle: The core of the matrix — a deeper insight
read.karmicNone: Your matrix contains all the numbers from 1 to 9. There are no obvious karmic gaps — you are focusing on deepening the existing energies.
read.karmicIntro: The numbers missing from your matrix indicate areas that require conscious effort in this life. These are not weaknesses — they are areas for growth.
read.compatibilityActiveBanner: "For someone" mode is active — you can compare the matrices in the 'Deeper' tab.
read.compatibilityInactiveBanner: Enable "For someone" mode to see a full comparison of the two matrices.
read.compatibilityAdd: Add a person to the comparison

center.desc: An anchor of identity. The place you left and the place you return to.

top.desc: Energy reaching for its full potential. Aspirations and willpower.

bottom.desc: Energy arriving as a lesson. Karma and patterns requiring integration.

left.desc: The maternal line. Personality, instinct, inner drive.

right.desc: The paternal line. Manifestation, influence on the outside world.

deep.ancestorIntro: The matrix encodes not only your energy, but also patterns passed down through the generations. The right-hand side represents the father’s line, the left-hand side the mother’s, and the bottom represents the collective karma of the family.

ancestorItems.title: Father’s Line Programme
ancestorItems.desc: The energy in the '{{value}}' position on the right reflects patterns passed down through the paternal line: attitudes towards work, authority, money and boundaries.

ancestorItems.title: The Mother's Line Programme
ancestorItems.desc: The energy of the {{value}}, when in the left position, carries maternal patterns: care, emotionality, boundaries in relationships, and the way intimacy is experienced.

ancestorItems.title: Family food
ancestorItems.desc: {{value}}’s energy often appears in the stories of grandparents or great-grandparents as a karmic lesson. It is a pattern that your soul has taken on in order to bring it to a close — not to repeat it.

ancestorItems.title: A gift passed on
ancestorItems.desc: {{value}}’s Centre is the energy that you can pass on to future generations in a transformed form. Once you have worked through the patterns on the left and right, the centre becomes the point of healing for the entire lineage.

deep.decadesIntro: Each decade of life is imbued with a specific numerical energy. The active decade indicates the main theme you are working on during this phase.
deep.lifePathEyebrow: THE NUMBER OF THE WAY OF LIFE

lifePathRows.label: The path of life and the centre
lifePathRows.desc: When the energy of the life path {{lifePath}} meets the centre {{center}}, the synergy number {{interaction}} is formed. This is your main energy flow.

lifePathRows.label: The path of life and a lesson
lifePathRows.desc: The tension between the path {{lifePath}} and the lesson {{bottom}} yields the number {{interaction}} — the area where the potential encounters the greatest resistance.

lifePathRows.label: The path of life and relationships
lifePathRows.desc: The combination of {{lifePath}} and {{relationship}} produces the number {{interaction}}, which describes the quality of your close relationships.

deep.timelineIntro: Each year of life activates a different position in the 9-year cycle.
deep.relationshipInactiveBody: Activate "For Someone" mode to see how your energy field resonates with another person’s. The analysis covers the points of contact, tensions and synergies between the two fields.
deep.relationshipCenterMeta: The Way of Life {{lifePath}} · Relationships {{relationship}} · Lesson {{bottom}}

relationshipRows.label: Synergy between centres
relationshipRows.desc: When these two centres come together, a space called ‘{{result}}’ is created. It is an energy in which you both feel most like yourselves and complement each other.

relationshipRows.label: The intensity of the lesson
relationshipRows.desc: The two karmic lessons, {{a}} and {{b}}, create a dynamic {{result}}. This is where the greatest challenges lie, and at the same time, where we learn deeply from one another.

relationshipRows.label: The rhythm of the relationship
relationshipRows.desc: The relational fields of both matrices merge in a rhythm of {{result}}. This energy describes the kind of intimacy you both need.

moneyRows.title: Main financial programme
moneyRows.desc: {{value}}'s energy describes your fundamental physical pattern.

moneyRows.title: Resource feed
moneyRows.desc: {{value}}’s Centre reveals where your deep-seated sense of deserving comes from.
moneyRows.practice: Affirmation: "My centre {{value}} allows me to receive abundance without feeling guilty."

moneyRows.title: Blockage of abundance
moneyRows.desc: The karmic lesson associated with the number {{value}} often manifests in financial matters as a recurring pattern: a lack of money or a fear of losing it.
moneyRows.practice: Question: "In what way does the '{{value}}' lesson hinder my financial progress?"

moneyRows.title: The potential for realisation
moneyRows.desc: The right-hand side of the matrix {{value}} represents your ability to transform energy into form.

deep.missionIntro: The centre of the matrix is your comfort zone. The top represents your mission — the direction in which you grow when you act boldly.

missionRows.label: Comfort zone
missionRows.desc: {{value}} Centre: your safe haven. You feel safe here. {{meaning}}

missionRows.label: Mission and vocation
missionRows.desc: {{value}} Mountain: a symbol of aspiration and growth. It takes courage to venture out from the centre. {{meaning}}

missionRows.label: Growth spurt
missionRows.desc: The tension between purpose and comfort: {{value}}. This is where real growth happens.

aiRows.title: Ancestral patterns and liberation
aiRows.copy: Oracle identifies which family patterns are encoded in the matrix.

aiRows.title: A synthesis of finance, health and relationships
aiRows.copy: Oracle brings together all three areas of life through the lens of a matrix.

aiPrompts.title: Ask about the core of the soul
aiPrompts.copy: Ask the AI to break down the {{center}} website into daily decisions, relationships and emotional well-being.
aiPrompts.context: I am on the Soul Matrix screen. My centre is {{center}}, relationships are {{relationship}}, money energy is {{money}}, and the karmic lesson is {{bottom}}. Please explain the core of this matrix to me and show me how it works in everyday life.

aiPrompts.title: Ask about the lock and the shadow
aiPrompts.copy: Let AI explain how the ‘{{bottom}}’ lesson undermines the movement and what it really aims to teach.
aiPrompts.context: I am analysing my Soul Matrix. My karmic lesson is {{bottom}}, my personal power is {{top}}, and my centre is {{center}}. Show me how my shadow works and what gentle movement will truly unblock me.

aiPrompts.title: A full reading of all 8 items
aiPrompts.copy: Oracle analyses the entire matrix and identifies one dominant pattern at present.

meditationRows.title: Inhalation
meditationRows.body: Sit comfortably and close your eyes. Take three deep breaths. Visualise a golden geometric grid — your Matrix.

meditationRows.title: {{center}} Centre
meditationRows.body: Visualise the number {{center}} as a glowing point in the centre of your chest. Feel its warmth. Let it pulsate rhythmically.

meditationRows.title: Vertical axis
meditationRows.body: A vertical axis rises from the centre. Upwards — the number {{top}}, your power. Downwards — the number {{bottom}}, your lesson and the earth.

meditationRows.title: Horizontal axis
meditationRows.body: Draw a horizontal axis. On the left is the number {{left}}, representing your personality. On the right is the number {{right}}, representing your material circumstances.

meditationRows.title: The purpose of the field
meditationRows.body: Sitting at the centre of the cross, ask yourself: which energy is demanding my attention today? Wait for an impulse; don’t overthink it.

meditationRows.title: Closing
meditationRows.body: Take three final breaths. Give thanks to each energy. Open your eyes and write down a single number or image that came to mind during the silence.

tipsRows.title: Matrix meditation
tipsRows.desc: Close your eyes and visualise a grid of numbers. Each number is a light within your energy field.

tipsRows.title: The Number Diary
tipsRows.desc: For 9 days, note down one discovery about each row of the matrix. Look for patterns.

tipsRows.title: Purpose of the item
tipsRows.desc: Choose one item from the grid each day and set an intention for it for the whole day.

practice.guideTitle: If you want to get something out of it
guideSteps: 1. Choose the number that causes you the greatest resistance or relief.
2. Treat it as the topic of the week, not as a theory to be memorised.
3. If anything is still unclear, just ask about that one point.
practice.integrationBody: Take the figures from the matrix and use them to reflect on relationships, work, intuition and the next practical step.
practice.integrationPrompt: My matrix shows the centre {{center}}, relationships {{relationship}} and the energy of money {{money}}. How does this pattern translate today into relationships, work and the next important step?

nextRows.label: Note on the template
nextRows.desc: Write down the one number that moves you the most today.

nextRows.label: Advanced numerology
nextRows.desc: Move on to a broader perspective on life and your personal year.

nextRows.label: The matrix in the relationship
nextRows.desc: See how your relationship number matches up with another person’s.

nextRows.label: Partner matrix
nextRows.desc: Go to a separate relational path with a full foreground.

nextRows.label: Share the matrix shortcut
nextRows.desc: Send a concise summary of the key points.

practice.nextPrompt: The centre of my matrix is {{center}}, relationships are {{relationship}}, and the energy of money is {{money}}. Which of these numbers is working the hardest today, and why?

daily.journalCta: Write down your thoughts in your diary

quickRows.label: Numerology — year and month
quickRows.desc: A Personal Year, a monthly publication, a 9-year cycle

quickRows.label: Compatibility as a couple
quickRows.desc: How does your matrix resonate with your partner?

quickRows.label: Oracle matrix
quickRows.desc: Ask the AI about today through the lens of the matrix

daily.oraclePrompt: Today’s active matrix position is {{dailyName}} (energy {{dailyEnergy}}). My personal year is {{personalYear}} — year {{yearArchetype}}. The centre of the matrix is {{center}}. How do these energies interact on this day, and what should I take into account now?

forSomeone.title: Who is this session for?
forSomeone.body: Enter the details of the person for whom you are taking the fingerprint scan.

1.name: Carnelian
1.use: It boosts initiative and the courage to take the first step

2.name: Moonstone
2.use: It calms emotions and deepens intuition in relationships

3.name: Citrine
3.use: It inspires the joy of creation and a sense of ease in self-expression

4.name: Green jasper
4.use: It instils and reinforces a sense of regularity

5.name: Aquamarine
5.use: Promotes flexibility and openness to change

6.name: Rose quartz
6.use: It opens the heart and brings harmony to relationships

7.name: Amethyst
7.use: It deepens reflection and connection with higher wisdom

8.name: Tiger's eye
8.use: It fosters agency and a leadership mindset

10.name: Obsidian
10.use: It conserves energy and clears past patterns

11.name: Selenite
11.use: It clears the space and enhances the flow of energy

22.name: Golden obsidian
22.use: It brings grand visions to life and builds lasting structures

1.attracts: Souls 2, 9 — the sensitivity and wisdom of withdrawal complement your strength of entry
1.tension: Souls 1, 8 — the struggle for leadership and agency
1.gift: You give others the courage to take that first step.

2.attracts: Souls 1, 11 — initiative and masterful intuition carry you forward
2.tension: souls 5, 9 — the pace of change and closures can be overwhelming
2.gift: Your presence has a calming effect and brings the space together.

3.attracts: souls 6, 9 — care and wisdom create space for your self-expression
3.tension: souls 4, 7 — constraints and silence stifle your voice
3.gift: You inspire others to be creative.

4.attracts: Souls 8, 22 — agency and mastery co-create enduring structures
4.tension: Souls 3 and 5 — spontaneity and chaos are throwing you off balance
4.gift: You give others a sense of stability and security.

5.attracts: Souls 1 and 3 — initiative and self-expression support your freedom
5.tension: Souls 4, 6 — obligations and routine slow down your flow
5.gift: You inspire others to embrace change and new opportunities.

6.attracts: Souls 2, 9 — sensitivity and introversion resonate with your caring nature
6.tension: Souls 5, 11 — freedom and hypersensitivity are draining your resources
6.gift: Your love heals the space around you.

7.attracts: Souls 11, 2 — intuition and subtlety deepen your understanding
7.tension: souls 1, 8 — action and materiality may seem superficial
7.gift: You bring depth and meaning to others in the darkness.

8.attracts: Psalms 4:22 — Structure and mastery support your agency
8.tension: Souls 2, 7 — gentleness and reserve may hinder your progress
8.gift: You are opening the door to financial freedom for others.

9.attracts: Souls 3, 6 — creativity and the heart resonate with your wisdom
9.tension: Souls 1, 8 — your ego and ambition clash with your devotion
9.gift: Your presence teaches others how to let go without pain.

10.attracts: Souls 5, 13 — change and transformation form a common axis
10.tension: Souls 4 and 6 — stability and habit are holding back your evolution
10.gift: You give others the courage to make a complete U-turn.

11.attracts: Souls 2 and 7 — sensitivity and depth resonate with your intuition
11.tension: souls 4, 8 — materialism and structure can be mundane

22.attracts: Souls 4, 8 — builders and leaders are shaping a vision of the future together with you
22.tension: Souls 3, 5 — chaos and change are destabilising your grand structures
22.gift: You make a reality what others can only dream of.

yearGuidance.1: The Year of the One is a time for new beginnings and bold initiatives. Sow the seeds of what you wish to reap in the coming cycle.
yearGuidance.2: The Year of the Two brings partnerships, patience and diplomacy. Listen more than you speak — the answer will come from your relationships.
yearGuidance.3: The Year of the Three brings with it expression, creativity and the joy of communication. Everything you create now carries an energy of lightness.
yearGuidance.4: The Year of the Four lays the foundations. Consistent effort yields lasting results — avoid wasting your energy.
yearGuidance.5: The Year of the Five is about change, freedom and new experiences. Be ready to let go of what holds you back and embrace what helps you grow.
yearGuidance.6: The Year of the Six focuses on home, family and responsibility. Harmony in your relationships is your greatest asset.
yearGuidance.7: The Year of the Seven encourages deeper reflection, spirituality and inner exploration. Silence and solitude are now more rewarding than activity.
yearGuidance.8: The year of the Eight fosters initiative, achievement and leadership. Your power is transformed into tangible, measurable results.
yearGuidance.9: The year of the Nine brings the cycle to a close. Let go of the past — relationships, projects, beliefs — to make room for the new.
yearGuidance.11: The year of the 11 brings masterful intuition and spiritual awakening. Your intuition outweighs your rationality — trust it.
yearGuidance.22: The year 2022 is the year of the Master Materialist. The potential for building something great and lasting is exceptionally high right now.

decadeThemes.1: Building identity and laying the foundations
decadeThemes.2: Relationships, intuition and the search for harmony
decadeThemes.3: Expression, creativity and discovering one’s voice
decadeThemes.4: Structure, operation and a solid foundation
decadeThemes.12: Letting go of control and profound renewal
decadeThemes.13: Fundamental transformation and letting go of burdens
decadeThemes.15: Coming to terms with attachments and patterns
decadeThemes.16: A turning point and rebuilding on new foundations
decadeThemes.18: Working with the subconscious and one’s inner shadows
decadeThemes.20: Awakening and coming to terms with the past
decadeThemes.21: Integration and wholeness of all parts of oneself
decadeThemes.22: Excellence and building a lasting legacy

affirmations.1: I am the architect of my own life. My will is enough to get started.
affirmations.2: My sensitivity is my strength. I listen, I feel, and I build bridges of love.
affirmations.3: I express myself without apology. My voice and my work have value.
affirmations.4: I’m building a solid foundation, step by step. Consistency is my superpower.
affirmations.5: I am free to change and grow. New experiences make me stronger.
affirmations.6: I look after others out of love, not fear. Harmony begins with me.
affirmations.7: My depth and reflection are a treasure. Silence leads me to the truth.
affirmations.8: I act with strength and responsibility. I manifest what I truly want.
affirmations.9: I let go of the past with gratitude. My closures make room for the new.
affirmations.10: I am ready for a transformation. Every turning point in my life matters.
affirmations.11: My intuition is spot on. I trust what I feel deep in my heart.
affirmations.22: I bring grand visions to life. I build something lasting and meaningful for the future.

karmicLessons.1: Lack of initiative — you learn to take the lead, make decisions and venture into the unknown without a roadmap.
karmicLessons.2: Lack of patience — you learn to wait, listen and build relationships at a more gentle pace.
karmicLessons.3: Lack of self-expression — you’re learning to speak your truth, to create and to show yourself to the world.
karmicLessons.4: Lack of discipline — you learn about structure, routine and keeping the promises you make to yourself.
karmicLessons.5: A lack of adaptability — you learn to find the courage to embrace change, to travel and to step outside your comfort zone.
karmicLessons.6: A lack of care — you learn responsibility for relationships, the home and mutuality in intimacy.
karmicLessons.7: A lack of reflection — you learn to pause, analyse and develop a deeper connection with your inner self.
karmicLessons.8: A lack of agency — you learn about leadership, resource management and moving beyond the role of an observer.
karmicLessons.9: Unfinished business — you learn to draw conclusions, gain wisdom from experience, and let go of the past.

dailyQuestions.center: Where do you feel most like yourself these days? What helps you feel centred again?
dailyQuestions.top: What do you want to bring to the space around you today? What power within you is calling out to be expressed?
dailyQuestions.bottom: What requires patience or acceptance today? What is your lesson for the day?
dailyQuestions.left: How do you react instinctively today? What does your inner self need right now?
dailyQuestions.right: What do you want to bring to life today? How do you make your presence felt in the world?
dailyQuestions.relationship: How are your relationships today? Who needs your attention or presence the most today?
dailyQuestions.money: How are you doing with your agency today? What is blocking or facilitating the flow of material energy?
dailyQuestions.lifePath: Are today’s decisions in line with your deeper path? What does your life’s path suggest today?

yearMantras.1: I’m getting started. I’m making a decision. I’m taking action.
yearMantras.2: I listen. I feel. I connect.
yearMantras.3: I create. I express myself. I shine.
yearMantras.4: I build. I organise. I persevere.
yearMantras.5: I’m changing. I’m experimenting. I’m taking the plunge.
yearMantras.6: I care. I bring harmony. I take responsibility.
yearMantras.7: I reflect. I meditate. I understand.
yearMantras.8: I act. I manifest. I bring about.
yearMantras.9: I let go. I release. I give up.
yearMantras.11: I feel. I channel. I inspire.
yearMantras.22: I see big things. I make lasting things a reality. I build for the future.

energyMeanings.1: The energy of initiation. It teaches courage, self-determination and taking the first step without waiting for the perfect moment.
energyMeanings.2: The energy of sensitivity and empathy. It enhances intuition, our perception of relationships, and the need for a more subtle pace.
energyMeanings.3: The energy of expression. It demands a voice, creativity, communication and the courage to be seen.
energyMeanings.4: The energy of structure. It reminds us of boundaries, discipline and building something that stands the test of time.
energyMeanings.5: The energy of change. It stirs what has become stagnant and tests whether you can remain true to yourself whilst in motion.
energyMeanings.6: The energy of the heart and responsibility. It concerns bonds, care, harmony and being there for others in a mature way without losing oneself.
energyMeanings.7: The energy of the search for meaning. It leads us deeper, towards knowledge, spirituality and questions that cannot be dismissed with a superficial answer.
energyMeanings.8: The energy of agency. It combines manifestation, influence, ambition and the art of handling power responsibly.
energyMeanings.9: The energy of closure. It reflects the wisdom that comes from experience, compassion and a willingness to bring a cycle to an end.
energyMeanings.10: The energy of a change of fortune. It teaches us that a change of direction can be a blessing, provided you don’t cling desperately to the old narrative.
energyMeanings.11: The energy of inner strength. It works through self-control, dignity and a deep connection with one’s core.
energyMeanings.12: The energy of coming to a halt and gaining a new perspective. It is a lesson in letting go of control and finding meaning where there was previously only a sense of being stuck.
energyMeanings.13: The energy of transformation. It does not take away without reason; rather, it paves the way for a more authentic way of life.
energyMeanings.14: The energy of alchemy. It teaches balance, patience and the art of blending opposites into a more mature whole.
energyMeanings.15: The energy of attachment and desire. It reveals where you are giving in to fear, temptation or a compulsive need for control.
energyMeanings.16: The energy of a turning point. It breaks down what can no longer stand on its old foundations.
energyMeanings.17: The energy of hope and inspiration. It reminds us of the light that returns after a difficult period and leads to renewal.
energyMeanings.18: The energy of the shadow and the subconscious. It brings dreams, premonitions, fears, and matters that require a more delicate approach to interpretation.
energyMeanings.19: The energy of visibility. It fosters confidence, clarity and the courage to step out of the shadows and into a fuller life.
energyMeanings.20: The energy of awakening. It calls for coming to terms with the past and consciously moving into the next phase.
energyMeanings.21: The energy of integration. It demonstrates maturity, wholeness and the ability to bring together different parts of oneself into a single, coherent path.
energyMeanings.22: The energy of freedom and trust. It holds the promise of a fresh start, without the need to have all the answers straight away.
energyMeanings.fallback: This energy points to an active area of your life that requires closer examination in the context of your current path.
